_comment: Mutation testing scoped to the safety/correctness crown jewels — proves the tests would CATCH a regression, not just execute the code. ASR-correction is deliberately NOT here: it's heuristic QUALITY code whose safety-relevant guards (never fire on negation/greeting/injection) are covered by src/security/corpus.test.ts + asr-correction.test.ts, while its scoring thresholds produce many equivalent mutants that add noise, not signal. Run with `npm run test:mutation`; not in the fast PR lane.
